title: Update Settings
description: Configure the TripAdvisor Restaurants Scraper parameters and options

content.introduction: Configure your TripAdvisor Restaurants Scraper squid settings to control the maximum number of restaurants to scrape per search. Adjust settings based on your data collection needs.

squidParams.title: Squid Parameters
squidParams.content: The following parameters can be configured in the `params` object:

rows.description: Maximum number of restaurants to scrape per task

generalSettings.title: General Settings
generalSettings.content: Standard squid settings that apply to all scrapers:

rows.description: Mark squid as complete when all tasks finish
Remove line breaks from text fields

proTips.content: Start with a smaller max_results value (e.g., 50) to test your search before scaling up for larger data collection.
TripAdvisor results include both claimed and unclaimed business profiles. Claimed profiles tend to have more complete information.

seo.title: Update Settings - TripAdvisor Restaurants Scraper - Lobstr.io API
seo.description: Configure your TripAdvisor Restaurants Scraper with max_results and other settings for restaurant data extraction.
